ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot interacting with a window, perhaps looking out or cleaning it.  The movement will be deliberate and focused. Frame 1 will show the robot with its arms at its sides, relaxed. Frame 2 will have the robot's right arm extended, reaching toward a point on the window, with the hand slightly angled downward as if tracing the frame. Frame 3 will have the robot's left arm raising, mimicking the action of wiping the window, with the right arm remaining mostly in position. Frame 4 will show both arms returning to the sides, implying completion of the interaction.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to engage
right arm reaches out, tracing the window frame
left arm wipes the glass while the right arm steadies
both arms return to rest, the window is clear
